title: Australian Narutomaki Tasty Bowl
description: A fusion dish featuring Australian beef, Narutomaki noodles, and a twist of Japanese flavors, served in a tasty bowl.

ingredients.name: Tasty stir-fry sauce
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the beef sirloin with salt and pepper.
Grill the beef for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Meanwhile, cook the Narutomaki noodles according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the tasty stir-fry sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked beef and noodles to the pan, and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
Serve hot in a tasty bowl.
